title: InfinityCraft: Hero-verse
description: Welcome to the world of Heroes and Villains!
body:
![logo :3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/beda854f3c8db8afd3ee324b1b29327d720e77b3.png)

**Welcome to the world of Heroes and Villains!**

**This is the official modpack for the InfinityCraft SMP, where you forge your own path as a hero, a villain, or anything in between.**

**🦸 Unlock Your Powers:**

**Gain superhuman abilities in two distinct ways:**

**Craftable Powers – Create powers like X-Genes, syringes, and more using in-game resources.**

**Discoverable Powers – Find legendary items like Lantern Rings, Symbiotes, and other rare abilities hidden throughout the world.**


**🚀 Beyond the Overworld:**

**Explore space, visit other dimensions, and uncover new frontiers beyond vanilla Minecraft.**

**🧪 Built on Palladium:**

**Includes custom HeroPacks to enhance the experience:**

**Fsang18's HeroPack**

**NBC Heroes**


**Danny Phantom HeroPack**

**Alienevo**

**👥 Multiplayer-Ready, Solo-Approved:**

**While designed for our InfinityCraft SMP, the modpack works great in singleplayer too.**

**Welcome to the world of Heroes and Villains — will you protect it, or rule it?**
